title: Sky TierTagger
description: Shows players’ tiers from MC Tier lists next to their names over 30+ tier lists!
body:
# Sky TierTagger
This is a fork of [MCTiers TierTagger](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiertagger), specially made for tierlists that use **Sky Market's Tierlist Bot**. It currently supports over 30 tierlists and will continue to support more in the future. You can get the bot [here](https://discord.gg/JTwtQ3B2CM).

**NOTE:** This mod depends on [ukulib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib).

## Features
- Supports cracked players
- Automatically detects tierlists no updates needed
- Able to change tier colors, switch tierlists, and edit settings
- Clean and organized menu

## Planned Features
- Select multiple tierlists at once
- Tier color changes depending on the tierlist
- Staff ranks
- More Gamemode icons
- Tierlist Profile showing on Tierlists Page and Discord Links
## Example
![Shows Tiers next to name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae20e83e56d49d742737a4367dd462e88368697b.png)

## Supported Versions
**Currently, mod only supports 1.21.11.** I tried converting older versions, but it was too much work and not worth it. I will add support for newer versions when they are released in the future.
